<!-- vignettes/telemetry/_setup.qmd
     Shared setup partial for the telemetry page set. Included as the FIRST
     body line of every page in this folder (see index.qmd and siblings).
     Re-runs the shared hover-popup + safe_tar_read infrastructure on every
     page, since each page is now an independent render target.
-->

{{< include /_includes/hover-popups.qmd >}}
{{< include /_includes/_safe-tar-read.qmd >}}

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.width = 10,
  fig.height = 6,
  echo = FALSE
)
```
